holdings.infoBox: SQS is an equity ETF with a total of 557 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 8.48%, Alphabet at 7.43%, Apple at 7.04%, Microsoft at 5.77%, and Broadcom at 4.62%.

overview.description: The Sapient Quality Select ETF (SQS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is an actively managed ETF that invests in companies with quality and growth characteristics from around the world. The fund selects companies expected to benefit from catalysts believed to drive sustained growth over time. SQS was launched on Mar 13, 2026 and is issued by Sapient.
